requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling and Ozone/HFC Controls (PNS IEC 60335-2-24 + Philippine ODS/HFC framework)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理及臭氧/HFC管控（PNS IEC 60335-2-24 + 菲律宾ODS/HFC框架）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理及臭氧/HFC管控（PNS IEC 60335-2-24 + 菲律賓ODS/HFC框架）

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold in the Philippines have largely transitioned to R-600a (isobutane, GWP ≈ 3), a hydrocarbon refrigerant accepted in the market. Refrigerant safety is governed through PNS IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant provisions: maximum R-600a charge per appliance configuration, ventilation, ignition-source control, and required markings and instructions. Manufacturers must declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge quantity in grams in product documentation and on the rating plate. At the national level, the Philippines is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment; ozone-depleting substances and HFCs are controlled by the Department of Environment and Natural Resources — Environmental Management Bureau (DENR-EMB) under the Philippine HCFC/HFC phase-down framework. Because R-600a is a hydrocarbon (not an HFC or HCFC), it is not subject to the HFC phase-down quota, but charge and flammability documentation must still meet PNS IEC 60335-2-24.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾销售的家用电冰箱已大量转向使用R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3），一种被市场接受的碳氢化合物制冷剂。制冷剂安全通过PNS IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂条款管控：每种器具配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风、点火源控制及所需标识和说明书。制造商须在产品文件及铭牌上声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）。在国家层面，菲律宾是《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方；消耗臭氧层物质及HFC由环境与自然资源部—环境管理局（DENR-EMB）依据菲律宾HCFC/HFC削减框架管控。由于R-600a为碳氢化合物（非HFC或HCFC），不受HFC削减配额约束，但充注量及可燃性文件仍须符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓銷售的家用電冰箱已大量轉向使用R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3），一種被市場接受的碳氫化合物製冷劑。製冷劑安全通過PNS IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑條款管控：每種器具配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風、點火源控制及所需標識和說明書。製造商須在產品文件及銘牌上聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）。在國家層面，菲律賓是《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方；消耗臭氧層物質及HFC由環境與自然資源部—環境管理局（DENR-EMB）依據菲律賓HCFC/HFC削減框架管控。由於R-600a為碳氫化合物（非HFC或HCFC），不受HFC削減配額約束，但充注量及可燃性文件仍須符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24。

standards_or_laws: PNS IEC 60335-2-24 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances — flammable refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits, ventilation and ignition-source provisions
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment (Philippines is a Party) — ODS/HFC controls administered by DENR-EMB
Republic Act No. 6969 (Toxic Substances and Hazardous and Nuclear Wastes Control Act) and DENR Administrative Orders — Philippine ozone-depleting substance / HFC management framework

summary.en: China regulates flammable refrigerant use in household appliances through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24 (charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source control). China is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and ratified the Kigali Amendment in June 2021, operating its own HCFC/HFC phase-down schedule administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). As in the Philippines, R-600a as a hydrocarbon is not subject to HFC phase-down quotas. Chinese appliance manufacturers already supplying R-600a units are generally well-positioned for the refrigerant aspect of Philippine market access, but must verify charge amount and documentation against PNS IEC 60335-2-24 acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 4706.13-2014对家用器具中可燃制冷剂的使用进行管理，其中纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定（充注量限制、通风、点火源控制）。中国是《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方，并于2021年6月批准《基加利修正案》，依据生态环境部（MEE）管理的自有HCFC/HFC削减计划运作。与菲律宾相同，R-600a作为碳氢化合物不受HFC削减配额约束。已供应R-600a产品的中国器具制造商在菲律宾市场准入的制冷剂方面一般具备较好条件，但须核实充注量及文件是否符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24的接受要求。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 4706.13-2014對家用器具中可燃製冷劑的使用進行管理，其中納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定（充注量限制、通風、點火源控制）。中國是《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方，並於2021年6月批准《基加利修正案》，依據生態環境部（MEE）管理的自有HCFC/HFC削減計畫運作。與菲律賓相同，R-600a作為碳氫化合物不受HFC削減配額約束。已供應R-600a產品的中國器具製造商在菲律賓市場准入的製冷劑方面一般具備較好條件，但須核實充注量及文件是否符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24的接受要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — provisions for flammable refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is mainly documentation and acceptance rather than fundamental technology, since both China GB 4706.13 and Philippine PNS IEC 60335-2-24 derive from the same IEC parent: (1) Charge and flammability documentation must be presented in the form required for BPS certification and ICC issuance — refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and EN/IEC-equivalent safety markings per PNS IEC 60335-2-24. (2) Charge-limit verification — Chinese CCC test reports may have been generated under slightly different configurations; the R-600a charge must be confirmed against PNS IEC 60335-2-24 maximum limits for the Philippine market. (3) HFC models — if any export model still uses an HFC (e.g., R-134a), the importer should confirm the unit is not affected by Philippine HFC controls administered by DENR-EMB and any DENR import documentation for HFC-charged products. R-600a units avoid the HFC quota pathway entirely.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，由于中国GB 4706.13与菲律宾PNS IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC母标准，差距主要在于文件和接受，而非根本性技术：（1）充注量与可燃性文件须以BPS认证及ICC签发所要求的形式提交——制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据PNS IEC 60335-2-24的EN/IEC等效安全标识。（2）充注量限值核验——中国CCC检测报告可能在略有不同的配置下生成；须针对菲律宾市场确认R-600a充注量是否符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24最大限值。（3）HFC型号——若任何出口型号仍使用HFC（如R-134a），进口商应确认该产品不受DENR-EMB管理的菲律宾HFC管控影响，并核实含HFC充注产品的任何DENR进口文件。R-600a产品完全避开HFC配额路径。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，由於中國GB 4706.13與菲律賓PNS IEC 60335-2-24均源自同一IEC母標準，差距主要在於文件和接受，而非根本性技術：（1）充注量與可燃性文件須以BPS認證及ICC簽發所要求的形式提交——製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據PNS IEC 60335-2-24的EN/IEC等效安全標識。（2）充注量限值核驗——中國CCC檢測報告可能在略有不同的配置下生成；須針對菲律賓市場確認R-600a充注量是否符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24最大限值。（3）HFC型號——若任何出口型號仍使用HFC（如R-134a），進口商應確認該產品不受DENR-EMB管理的菲律賓HFC管控影響，並核實含HFC充注產品的任何DENR進口文件。R-600a產品完全避開HFC配額路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via PNS IEC 60335-2-24 (R-600a charge limits and flammable-refrigerant provisions, within BPS certification/ICC scope); national ODS/HFC controls administered by DENR-EMB under the Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: Department of Environment and Natural Resources — Environmental Management Bureau (DENR-EMB), Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the accepted refrigerant for Philippine-market household refrigerators and, as a hydrocarbon, is outside the HFC phase-down quota. Manufacturers must verify the R-600a charge against PNS IEC 60335-2-24 limits and document refrigerant type and charge weight in the form BPS requires for ICC/PS certification. Any HFC-based models should be checked against Philippine DENR-EMB HFC controls before importation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是菲律宾市场家用电冰箱被接受的制冷剂，作为碳氢化合物不受HFC削减配额约束。制造商须核实R-600a充注量是否符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24限值，并以BPS对ICC/PS认证所要求的形式记录制冷剂类型及充注量。任何含HFC的型号在进口前应依据菲律宾DENR-EMB的HFC管控进行核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是菲律賓市場家用電冰箱被接受的製冷劑，作為碳氫化合物不受HFC削減配額約束。製造商須核實R-600a充注量是否符合PNS IEC 60335-2-24限值，並以BPS對ICC/PS認證所要求的形式記錄製冷劑類型及充注量。任何含HFC的型號在進口前應依據菲律賓DENR-EMB的HFC管控進行核查。
